## reference · exploratory testing heuristics
* Use data-type attacks, such as trying scientific notation for float numbers
* Perform web tests, including resizing browser windows to test application rendering
* Consider CRUD (create, read, update, delete) operations when testing
* Be aware of boundaries and edge cases when testing
* Use heuristics, such as finding all variables that could be changed, including input, output, hidden, and subtle variables
* Do not confuse speed with progress in testing
* Use frameworks, such as observation, to guide testing
* Test with different window resolutions to investigate application rendering
* Consider interruptions and deepwalk probe lists when testing
Sources: https://blog.tentamen.eu/testing-heuristics-cheat-sheet/
